page_summary: A page with a paragraph of text in an unreadable runic/constructed script, followed by a geometric diagram of a large circle containing numbered smaller circles connected by lines.
text_blocks: ᛗ ᚨ ᚨᛞ ᚦᛃ · ᛫ ᛏ ᛏᛁ ᚠᚢ ᚦᛁᚾ ᚺᛁᛚᛞ ᛏᛉᛏ ᛁᛋᛁ ᛁᚾ ᚦ ᛋᛖᛁᛞ ᚺᛁᛚ · ᛁᛏ ᛋᛖᛁᛞ ᛒᛖᛃ ᛋᚢᛁᛏ ᛁᛏ ᚠᛁᚾᛞᛋ ᛁᚾ ᚦ ᛏᛁᛒᛁ ᚺᛁᛚᛞ ᚺᛁ ᚠᚢ ᛏᛁᛒᛁ ᚺᛁᛚᛞ ᚺᛁ ᛋᛁ ᛏᛁᛒᛁ ᚺᛁᛚᛞ ᚠᛚᛁ ᚺᛁᛚᛞ ᚺᛁᛚᛞ ᚺᛁ ᛋᛁ ᚨ ᛏᛁᛒᛁ ᚺᛁᛚᛞ ᚠᚢ ᚨ ᛏᛁᛒᛁ ᚺᛁᛚᛞ ᚠᛁᚾᛞᛋ · ᚠᛁᛏ ᛏᚢᛁᛋᛁᛋ ᛞᛁᚾᛁᛉ
ᛞ ᚢᚾᛞᛁᛏᛁ ᚠᛁᛁᛁᛃᚨᚨ · ᛫ᛏᛁᛒᛁ ᛋᛁᛞᛁ ᛋᛁ ᛏᛁᛒᛁ ᚠᛁᛁᛁᛁᛚᛞ ᛞᛁᛉ ᛏᛁᛒᛁ ᛏᚢᛁᛋᛁᛋ ᚺᛁ ᛏᛁᛒᛁ ᚠᛁᛁᛁᛁᛚᛞ ᚠᛁᛁᛁᛁᛁᛚᛞ · ᛏᛁᛒᛁ ᚺᛁᛚᛞ ᚺᛁ · ᛋᛁ ᛁᛋ ᚺᛁᛚᛞ

symbols.description: Text written in an unidentified runic/constructed script resembling a phonetic alphabet with characters like ᛗ, ᚨ, ᛞ, ᚦ, ᛃ, ᛏ, ᚠ, ᚢ, ᚾ, ᚺ, ᛁ, ᛚ, ᛋ, ᛖ, ᛒ, ᛒ, ᚱ, ᚴ, ᛉ, ᛊ, ᛏᛟ

decorations.description: A large outer circle containing a network of smaller circles connected by straight lines (forming a vertical and horizontal cross) and curved arcs, each circle containing a number.
components: straight lines connecting the cardinal outer nodes (161-164 vertical, 169-172 horizontal) through the center
curved arcs connecting the four inner ring nodes to adjacent outer nodes
small curved arcs between the four central cluster nodes forming a flower-like pattern

uncertain_or_unreadable: The text is written in a constructed/unidentified runic script that I cannot read; I have attempted a phonetic-style transcription of the visible glyphs but cannot confirm meaning.
